name: anas-plugins
description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by anas-m1

plugins.name: prompt-toolkit
plugins.description: Three-command prompt engineering workflow. /prompt-craft improves a raw prompt, /prompt-refine steers it with instructions, /prompt-run executes it.

plugins.name: memory-drive
plugins.description: Persist project memory to Google Drive. Draft, refine, and commit memory entries from conversation or files. Load and search memory across sessions.

plugins.name: claude-setup
plugins.description: Scaffold a new project with CLAUDE.md, .claude/settings.json, .mcp.json, and .memory/ in one workflow. /scaffold drafts, /scaffold-refine adjusts, /scaffold-apply creates all files.

plugins.name: capture
plugins.description: Save context or instructions to the project's .memory/ folder with a preview-and-confirm step. /capture drafts the change, /capture-refine adjusts it, /capture-apply writes it.
